name: Running
description: One of the most effective calorie-burning exercises. Running at a moderate pace (8 km/h) burns significant calories while improving cardiovascular health.

name: Cycling
description: Cycling is a low-impact cardio exercise suitable for all fitness levels. Great for legs, core, and cardiovascular endurance.

name: Yoga
description: Yoga combines physical postures, breathing exercises, and meditation. While moderate in calorie burn, it improves flexibility, balance, and mental well-being.

name: HIIT Workout
description: High-Intensity Interval Training alternates intense bursts of activity with short rest periods. Highly efficient for calorie burning and metabolic boost.

name: Swimming
description: Swimming is a full-body workout that is easy on the joints. It builds endurance, strength, and cardiovascular fitness simultaneously.

name: Walking (Brisk)
description: Brisk walking is an accessible and effective low-impact exercise. Perfect for beginners and great for daily calorie management.

name: Strength Training
description: Weight training builds muscle mass which increases your resting metabolic rate. Essential for long-term fat loss and body composition changes.

name: Dancing
description: Dancing is a fun and social way to burn calories. From Bollywood to salsa, dancing improves coordination, mood, and fitness.

name: Basketball
description: Basketball provides an intense cardio workout while building agility, coordination, and teamwork skills.

name: Tennis
description: Tennis is a high-energy sport that combines cardiovascular exercise with explosive movements and coordination.

name: Jump Rope
description: Jump rope is one of the most calorie-efficient exercises per minute. It improves coordination, cardiovascular health, and leg power.

name: Stair Climbing
description: Stair climbing targets glutes, quads, and calves while providing excellent cardiovascular exercise. No equipment needed.

name: Elliptical Trainer
description: The elliptical provides a smooth, low-impact full-body workout. Ideal for those with joint issues who still want effective cardio.

name: Rowing
description: Rowing engages 86% of the muscles in your body. It combines strength and cardio for an incredibly efficient full-body workout.

name: Pilates
description: Pilates focuses on core strength, posture, and controlled movement. While not high in calorie burn, it transforms body composition over time.

name: Zumba
description: Zumba is a Latin-inspired dance fitness program. It makes cardio fun and is excellent for burning calories while improving rhythm and coordination.

name: Badminton
description: Badminton requires quick reflexes and bursts of speed, making it an excellent full-body workout that improves agility and hand-eye coordination.

name: Cricket
description: Cricket involves running, throwing, and batting. Depending on your role, it can be a moderate to intense physical activity.

name: Football (Soccer)
description: Football is a global sport that provides intense cardio, sprinting, and agility training. Excellent for overall fitness and teamwork.

name: Hiking
description: Hiking combines cardiovascular exercise with exposure to nature. Uphill hiking significantly increases calorie burn and leg strength.
